---
title: "M^c^Cool News: 04 Feb 1990"
mainfont: Courier Prime
---

__THE HEADLINES AT 1400 ON SUNDAY 4TH FEBRUARY 1990__

Due to the new year’s earthquake a new entrance to the DOT, Domain of Tartarus opened up near the town of Warboys. Raiders from the DOT attacked and pillaged the village but the military are now on the scene.
